Cakish · Brand Guidelines

Modern dessert branding for meaningful moments.

Cakish is positioned as a premium home bakery brand specialising in elegant pavlova centrepieces for birthdays, first communions, intimate events, and high-end gatherings. The identity should feel refined, feminine, modern, and quietly luxurious.

Brand Essence

Brand Name: Cakish

Category: Premium dessert / boutique bakery

Core Offer: Modern pavlova centrepieces with a luxury visual finish

Positioning: A premium dessert brand designed for elegant celebrations and meaningful hosting moments.

Suggested Tagline

Crafted for meaningful moments

Use this in marketing materials, social bios, packaging inserts, or the website. Keep the approved logo lockup unchanged.

Target Audience

Primary Customer

  • Women and families planning birthdays, first communions, baby showers, and elegant home gatherings
  • Hosts who care about table presentation and premium quality
  • Customers looking for something more special than a standard cake

Brand Promise

  • Visually striking desserts that feel gift-worthy and event-worthy
  • Fresh, handcrafted presentation with a modern premium look
  • A product that feels like a centrepiece, not just a dessert

Colour Palette

The palette should stay light, soft, and elevated. Gold is the premium accent, not the dominant wall colour of the brand.

Ivory
#F8F6F2
Soft Cream
#F3EFE9
Warm Beige
#E9E1D6
Soft Gold
#C6A769
Deep Charcoal
#2B2B2B

Typography Direction

The approved logo remains unchanged. For brand materials, use an elegant serif for headings and a clean sans-serif for body copy.

Playfair Display

Use for: Headlines, section titles, invitations, premium product names

Montserrat / Helvetica Neue

Use for: Body text, captions, price lists, packaging details, website copy

Logo Usage

This logo should remain visually clean and consistent. Do not redraw or restyle the approved mark.

Primary Use
Light backgrounds, website, printed inserts, social highlights

Neutral Use
Packaging cards, thank-you notes, soft-toned stationery

Dark Presentation
Use carefully for luxury mockups, not as the everyday primary version

Do

Keep plenty of space around the logo. Use light neutral backgrounds and let the mark breathe.

Do

Use the full approved lockup as the main brand mark when introducing the brand publicly.

Do Not

Stretch, squash, rotate, recolour randomly, or add new decorative elements to the logo.

Do Not

Place the logo over busy photography or strong colours that reduce the premium feel.

Photography Direction

Visual Style

  • Natural light only where possible
  • Clean marble, stone, linen, or warm wood surfaces
  • Top-down shots and soft angled close-ups
  • Minimal clutter and premium table styling

Product Focus

  • Highlight the floral arrangement of fruit and the structured cream piping
  • Show the pavlova as a centrepiece, not just a dessert
  • Use empty space around the product for a more editorial feel

Brand Voice

The tone should feel warm, refined, and confident. Never loud, salesy, or overly casual.

Preferred

Elegant pavlova centrepieces crafted fresh for meaningful celebrations.

Avoid

Delicious homemade cakes available now. Message us fast before they’re gone.

Preferred

Designed to be shared. Crafted to be remembered.

Avoid

Cheap desserts for all occasions.

Recommended Applications

Use This Brand On

  • Instagram profile and story highlights
  • Website landing page
  • Thank-you cards and order inserts
  • Packaging stickers and labels
  • Event menus or order brochures

Strategic Notes

  • Position Cakish as a premium dessert brand, not a mass bakery
  • Keep the offer curated and selective
  • Lean into first communions, birthdays, dinner hosting, and intimate event styling
  • Let the visuals sell the luxury before the copy does

Brand Mockups

These mockups show how the approved logo can live across packaging and social presence while keeping the premium look intact.

Sticker

Best for sealing tissue, thank-you cards, cake boxes, and branded order packaging.

Box / Packaging

A soft neutral box with the logo centered feels elevated, giftable, and appropriate for premium orders.

Instagram Profile

The logo works best inside a soft neutral circle with plenty of breathing room and consistent light backgrounds.
